headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From Citigroup’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Citigroup’s first quarter was marked by significant revenue growth across nearly all business lines, surpassing Wall Street’s expectations and leading to a notable positive market reaction. Management attributed the strong performance to momentum in institutional services, equities trading, and investment banking. CEO Jane Fraser highlighted that “four of the five core businesses saw revenue up double digits,” with Services delivering a 17% year-over-year increase due to robust deposit and fee g

headline: How The Royal Caribbean (RCL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Reset
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises now carries a slightly lower modeled fair value of US$348.46, down from US$362.04, a reduction of about US$13.58 in the latest update. This shift sits within a lively period of Street debate, where some major banks have been lifting targets into the US$370s while others have issued cuts as large as US$50. As you read on, you will see how these opposing calls fit together and how to keep track of the story as it evolves. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Royal...
